authKey.label: Friendbuy MAPI Key
authKey.description: Contact your Friendbuy account manager to generate your Friendbuy MAPI key and secret.

trackCustomer.title: Track Customer
trackCustomer.description: Create a new customer profile or update an existing customer profile.

name.label: Name
name.description: The user's full name. If the name trait doesn't exist then it will be automatically derived from the firstName and lastName traits if they are defined.

birthday.label: Birthday
birthday.description: The user's birthday in the format "YYYY-MM-DD", or "0000-MM-DD" to omit the year.

customerSince.label: Customer Since
customerSince.description: The date the user became a customer.

loyaltyStatus.label: Loyalty Status
loyaltyStatus.description: The status of the user in your loyalty program. Valid values are "in", "out", or "blocked".

isNewCustomer.label: New Customer Flag
isNewCustomer.description: Flag to indicate whether the user is a new customer.

friendbuyAttributes.label: Custom Attributes
friendbuyAttributes.description: Custom attributes to send to Friendbuy. You should pass an object whose keys are the names of the custom attributes and whose values are strings. Non-string-valued attributes will be dropped.

pageUrl.label: Page URL
pageUrl.description: The URL of the web page the event was generated on.

pageTitle.label: Page Title
pageTitle.description: The title of the web page the event was generated on.

trackPurchase.title: Track Purchase
trackPurchase.description: Record when a customer makes a purchase.

amount.label: Purchase Amount
amount.description: Purchase amount to be considered when evaluating reward rules.

currency.label: Currency
currency.description: The currency of the purchase amount.

coupon.label: Coupon
coupon.description: The coupon code of any coupon redeemed with the order.

attributionId.label: Friendbuy Attribution ID
attributionId.description: Friendbuy attribution ID that associates the purchase with the advocate who referred the purchaser.

referralCode.label: Friendbuy Referral ID
referralCode.description: Friendbuy referral code that associates the purchase with the advocate who referred the purchaser.

giftCardCodes.label: Gift Card Codes
giftCardCodes.description: An array of gift card codes applied to the order.

isNewCustomer.label: New Customer Flag
isNewCustomer.description: Flag to indicate whether the user is a new customer.

loyaltyStatus.label: Loyalty Program Status
loyaltyStatus.description: The status of the user in your loyalty program. Valid values are "in", "out", or "blocked".

birthday.label: Birthday
birthday.description: The user's birthday in the format "YYYY-MM-DD", or "0000-MM-DD" to omit the year.

friendbuyAttributes.label: Custom Attributes
friendbuyAttributes.description: Custom attributes to send to Friendbuy. You should pass an object whose keys are the names of the custom attributes and whose values are strings. Non-string-valued attributes will be dropped.

pageUrl.label: Page URL
pageUrl.description: The URL of the web page the event was generated on.

pageTitle.label: Page Title
pageTitle.description: The title of the web page the event was generated on.

trackSignUp.title: Track Sign Up
trackSignUp.description: Record when a customer signs up for a service.

isNewCustomer.label: New Customer Flag
isNewCustomer.description: Flag to indicate whether the user is a new customer.

loyaltyStatus.label: Loyalty Program Status
loyaltyStatus.description: The status of the user in your loyalty program. Valid values are "in", "out", or "blocked".

birthday.label: Birthday
birthday.description: The user's birthday in the format "YYYY-MM-DD", or "0000-MM-DD" to omit the year.

coupon.label: Coupon Code
coupon.description: Coupon code that customer supplied when they signed up.

attributionId.label: Friendbuy Attribution ID
attributionId.description: Friendbuy attribution ID that associates the customer who is signing up with the advocate who referred them.

referralCode.label: Friendbuy Referral ID
referralCode.description: Friendbuy referral code that associates the customer who is signing up with the advocate who referred them.

friendbuyAttributes.label: Custom Attributes
friendbuyAttributes.description: Custom attributes to send to Friendbuy. You should pass an object whose keys are the names of the custom attributes and whose values are strings. Non-string-valued attributes will be dropped.

pageUrl.label: Page URL
pageUrl.description: The URL of the web page the event was generated on.

pageTitle.label: Page Title
pageTitle.description: The title of the web page the event was generated on.

trackCustomEvent.title: Track Custom Event
trackCustomEvent.description: Record when a customer completes any custom event that you define.

eventType.label: Event Type
eventType.description: The type of the event to track.

eventProperties.label: Event Properties
eventProperties.description: Object containing the properties for the event being tracked. All of the fields in this object will be sent in the root of the Friendbuy track event.

deduplicationId.label: Event ID
deduplicationId.description: An identifier for the event being tracked to prevent the same event from being rewarded more than once.

pageUrl.label: Page URL
pageUrl.description: The URL of the web page the event was generated on.

pageTitle.label: Page Title
pageTitle.description: The title of the web page the event was generated on.
